_doc: Independent adversarial QA sign-off for the Wave-2 reach5 AO-network evidence file. READ-ONLY. This is the independent evidence-sufficiency gate (New session #1), separate from the main session's own _qa companion. Sign-off, not rubber-stamp: every contradiction test below was re-run from the raw file.
main_session_self_qa_companion: data/dso_research/ao_network_evidence_reach5_20260621_qa.json (06:22) — NOT relied upon; independent re-derivation below
UPSTREAM_FREEZE: CONSOLIDATION REMAINS FROZEN. The file itself states consolidation=HELD (wave-1 reset not confirmed): practice_locations/practices still carry 349 live ownership_tier rows, LEDGER=350, PROGRESS=349 (all must read 0). These verdicts pre-stage eligibility; nothing may be written to the DB until the reset clears.
why_clean: This wave baked in the QA standard up front (_meta.standard='corrected_2026-06-21'; regate_baked_in lists the branded_dso->dentist_multi pe-rule, stealth-no-url downgrade, not-corroborated->candidate, and specialist->undetermined rules). 11 rows were auto-regated branded_dso->dentist_multi before emission. Contrast Fleet B, which emitted raw and needed 59 corrections + 19 holds.

independent_contradiction_tests.ready_dentist_multi_with_url: 48 of 48 (all also carry an ao_cluster/ao_reach artifact)
independent_contradiction_tests.specialist_networks_excluded_from_GP: yes — Sharma endo + dental-specialist/implant networks routed to undetermined, correctly out of the GP denominator

network_exclusion_check.overlap_with_protected_set: none — this wave is a fresh reach>=5 batch; the protected/earlier-wave networks were not reprocessed (the regate rule is merely NAMED 'QA Belkic/Aqel rule').

residual_caveats_non_blocking: AO-REACH IS NOT OWNERSHIP PROOF (standing user rule). db_artifact.type='ao_reach' on all 84 rows means the structural signal is 'same authorized official across N ZIPs'. An authorized official can be a practice manager, spouse, attorney, or a DSO/MSO regional officer signing for many friendly-PCs — NOT necessarily the dentist-owner. For the 48 ready dentist_multi rows the accompanying evidence_url must, at validation time, confirm SAME-DENTIST-OWNER control (T3) rather than merely common AO; a URL that shows a DSO/MSO operator would re-route the row to T4/T5, and a URL that only confirms existence would drop it to candidate. The wave carries a URL on every ready row, so this is a per-row verification item, not a structural defect.

ALL ready rows are ready_for_validation, NOT final. Per the standing rule, consolidate_census.py is a schema/DB gate and does not re-judge evidence; this sign-off plus per-URL confirmation is the evidence authority before any DB write.
9 candidate + 5 undetermined are correctly NOT eligible (brand-token/address mismatch, or specialist-network exclusions) — no QA objection; leave parked.
recommendation: Accept the 70 ready_for_validation rows as consolidation-ELIGIBLE once the freeze lifts, subject to the per-URL dentist-owner-vs-MSO confirmation on the 48 dentist_multi at validation time. No tier corrections needed. Keep the 14 candidate/undetermined parked.
